response.justification: Candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise and senior-level technical maturity, but faces fundamental gaps in critical requirements. C++ work ended 10+ years ago with zero Rust experience, and recent career trajectory (4+ years TypeScript/Node.js) moves away from systems programming. Most critically, no demonstrated experience with navigation/routing systems or the production data pipeline optimization, fault tolerance, and performance work that defines this role.
strengths: Deep geospatial data expertise as founder of GISCollective and contributor to Open Green Map platforms
Senior/staff-level engineering judgment with proven ability to rapidly master diverse technical stacks
Some distributed systems exposure through Dunnhumby microservices work handling millions of requests/second
concerns: C++ experience is over a decade old (National Instruments 2014–2015); primary recent stack is TypeScript/Node.js/React web development
No demonstrated experience building or operating navigation, routing, or related guidance systems—a stated requirement
Career focused on application/web layer rather than systems-level programming; limited evidence of fault tolerance, consistency patterns, or high-performance data pipeline design
